scripts.dev: bun run dev:check && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "bun run dev:backend" "bun run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:check: bun run setup:env && bun run setup:deps
scripts.dev:backend: cd server-python && bash -c '(test -d venv || python3 -m venv venv) && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -q -r requirements.txt && python src/server.py'
scripts.dev:frontend: cd web-client && AGENT_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:8000 bun run dev
scripts.backend: cd server-python && source venv/bin/activate && python3 src/server.py
scripts.frontend: cd web-client && AGENT_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:8000 bun run dev
scripts.setup: bun run setup:env && bun run setup:backend && bun run setup:frontend && bun run setup:done
scripts.setup:env:
test -f server-python/.env.local || (cp server-python/.env.example server-python/.env.local && echo '
Created server-python/.env.local. Add Agora credentials before running the app.')
scripts.setup:deps: test -d node_modules || (echo 'Installing workspace dependencies...' && bun install)
scripts.setup:backend: cd server-python && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip && PIP_INDEX_URL=https://pypi.org/simple pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:done:
echo '
✅ Setup complete! Next steps:' && echo '   1. Run: agora project env write server-python/.env.local' && echo '   2. Run: bun run dev
'
scripts.doctor: bash -c 'set -e; echo "Checking shared repo prerequisites..."; command -v bun >/dev/null && echo "- bun available" || { echo "- bun not found"; exit 1; }; test -d node_modules && echo "- workspace dependencies installed" || { echo "- root node_modules missing; run bun install"; exit 1; }'
scripts.doctor:local: bash -c 'set -e; bun run doctor; command -v python3 >/dev/null && echo "- python3 available" || { echo "- python3 not found"; exit 1; }; test -f server-python/.env.local && echo "- server-python/.env.local present" || { echo "- missing server-python/.env.local"; exit 1; }; grep -Eq "^AGORA_APP_ID=.+$" server-python/.env.local && echo "- AGORA_APP_ID configured" || { echo "- AGORA_APP_ID missing in server-python/.env.local"; exit 1; }; grep -Eq "^AGORA_APP_CERTIFICATE=.+$" server-python/.env.local && echo "- AGORA_APP_CERTIFICATE configured" || { echo "- AGORA_APP_CERTIFICATE missing in server-python/.env.local"; exit 1; }'
scripts.verify:local: bun run doctor:local && bun run verify:backend && bun run verify:local:fastapi && bun run verify:web:proxy && bun run verify:web:build
scripts.verify:backend: cd server-python && python3 -m py_compile src/server.py src/agent.py
scripts.verify:web: bun run doctor && bun run verify:web:api && bun run verify:web:build
scripts.clean: bun run clean:backend && bun run clean:frontend
